# <Short Bug/Gap Title>

Build/branch, URL, and a reference to credentials used (never paste secrets here — link to
where they're stored).

## Steps to reproduce

1. ...
2. ...

## Expected vs Observed

**Expected:** ...
**Observed:** ...

## Root cause

If known. Leave as "unknown" if not yet diagnosed — don't guess.

## Fix

`docs/testing/findings/open/` to `docs/testing/findings/resolved/`, set `status: resolved`
(or `fixed`), and update the entry in `docs/testing/findings/README.md`.
